---
name: child-drops-the-hook
description: "Child that cites the rule but does not carry the hook mechanism."
metadata:
  node_type: memory
  type: feedback
---

This memory inherits the rule and the binding obligation. The rule applies; teams are bound by the obligation it imposes.

Premises: [[rule-with-hook]]. The cited premise carries the obligation; this child references it directly. Future maintenance should cite this child as the local instance of the rule.
